title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.370 - If objections made, court to determine same, when and how
text:
426.370.  If objections made, court to determine same, when and how. — If objections be made as aforesaid, to such application, the court shall cause the same to be considered, and shall determine the same, as provided for by rules of the court or special orders made therein.
(RSMo 1939 § 5775) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5665; 1919 § 661; 1909 § 934
